programmes.show_description: At Beaumont, surgeons race to save a man with brain fluid buildup, an awake surgery takes a risky turn, and a woman fights to regain movement after a devastating diagnosis. (SL,HD)
Holly realizes how big the syndicate behind the murders really is and manages to frame the main culprit while Luke continues to push the divorce process. (HD)

Ireland AM is the longest running daytime show in Ireland. Blending a mixture of lifestyle interviews and news content, with gardening, health, food and fashion seven days a week. (HD)
A mix of celebrity interviews, entertainment news, current affairs discussions, a look at sports competitions, health columns, cooking tips and tricks, and more. (HD)

Explosives Officer Lana Washington and her team find a man held captive in a cab with a note: Confess or Die. The race is on to uncover the bomber's identity and next target. (HD)
A young boy seeks help when his sister doesn't come home from work. Benson and Carisi suspect a woman's assault was prearranged by a third party. (HD)
